div.span: No
Yes
Start: Task 1
Create Lab VPC (CIDR: 10.0.0.0/16)
Modify VPC Settings: Enable DNS Hostnames
Create Public Subnet (CIDR: 10.0.0.0/24 in AZ-1)
Edit Subnet Settings: Enable Auto-assign Public IP
Create Private Subnet (CIDR: 10.0.2.0/23 in AZ-1)
Create Internet Gateway (Lab IGW)
Attach Lab IGW to Lab VPC
Create Public Route Table
Add Route to Public RT: 0.0.0.0/0 -> Lab IGW
Associate Public RT with Public Subnet
Create Public Security Group (Public SG: HTTP Port 80 from Anywhere)
Launch Public Instance (t3.micro, Public Subnet, Public SG)
Inject User Data to install Apache & PHP
Verify Web Server Page via Public DNS
Connect via SSM Session Manager & Verify Internet Connectivity
Create NAT Gateway (Lab NGW) in Public Subnet + Allocate EIP
Create Private Route Table
Add Route to Private RT: 0.0.0.0/0 -> Lab NGW
Associate Private RT with Private Subnet
Create Private Security Group (Private SG: HTTP Port 80 from Public SG)
Launch Private Instance (t3.micro, Private Subnet, Private SG)
Inject User Data to install Apache & PHP
Connect to Private Instance via SSM & Verify Outbound Internet via NAT GW
Optional: Troubleshoot Connectivity (Curl Private IP from Public Instance)
Is Ping Working?
Update Private SG: Add Inbound ICMP from Public SG
Ping succeeds!
Optional: Retrieve Instance Metadata using IMDSv2 Token
End of Lab
